name: the-book-of-boundaries-set-the-limits-that-will-set-you-free
description: Melissa Urban's practical guide to setting boundaries with scripts — specific language for family, work, relationships, and digital life. Stop people-pleasing and start living free.
useCase: Learn to set and maintain healthy boundaries in every area of life using scripts, Mirror and Shine, and self-boundary practices.
knownRisks: Some scripts may feel unnatural at first
Boundaries may upset people used to unlimited access
Cultural differences may affect boundary expectations
